stdout:
## Issue success criteria (from description)
- ✅ External-toolchain setup and `proofs/` scaffolding exist (`proofs/lean-toolchain`, `proofs/lakefile.lean`, `scripts/verify-lean.sh`).
- ❌ `Mathlib` dependency is not present in `proofs/lakefile.lean` (only `aeneas` is required at lines 5–6), despite the issue asking for Mathlib dependency setup.
- ❌ Translation is **not** succeeding for both `gfp/` and `gfpn/`: `scripts/verify-lean.sh` marks `gf2_core::gfpn` opaque (line 28), and `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md` states `gfpn/` is blocked (lines 42–45).
- ❌ CI does not run `charon && aeneas && lake build`; `.github/workflows/ci.yml` Lean job only runs `cd proofs && lake build` (line 123).
- ✅ Risk gate on const generics is addressed/documented: `Fp<const P: u64>` extraction is documented as working (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md` lines 47–51; generated param in `proofs/Gf2Core/Types.lean` line 114).
- ✅ The explicit success criterion “`lake build` compiles generated Lean code” appears satisfied by gate context (`lake-build: passed`) and committed generated Lean files.

## No technical debt
- ❌ New CI design permits stale generated Lean artifacts to pass (because regeneration is not enforced in CI), which introduces process debt relative to the requested end-to-end pipeline.

## Separation of concerns
- ✅ No evidence of forbidden dependency direction; this change does not modify crate dependency wiring between `gf2-core` and `gf2-coding`.

## Functional paradigm and performance
- ✅ No Rust algorithmic hot-path changes were introduced; no regressions observed against functional/performance guidance.

## Correctness (tail masking, bit numbering, field axioms)
- ✅ No `BitVec` mutator or GF arithmetic implementation was modified in this issue, so core invariants are not directly impacted by this diff.
- ⚠️ `gfpn/` verification scope remains unachieved due opaque extraction, so correctness coverage is incomplete vs planned scope.

## Testing
- ❌ Requirement “no test or lint failures” is not satisfied for this reviewed head: these commits are ahead of `origin/main` (11 commits), and there is no corresponding CI evidence for SHAs `e8c2b15` / `03d0263`; additionally, requested end-to-end Lean regeneration is not run in CI.

## Unsafe isolation
- ✅ No new unsafe Rust code introduced outside `gf2-kernels-simd`.

## Documentation
- ✅ Workarounds are documented clearly (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md`), and developer-facing commands were updated (`CLAUDE.md`).
- ⚠️ Documentation/planning claims support for `gfpn/` are now explicitly contradicted by current extraction reality (documented blocker), leaving scope partially incomplete.

## Prior review feedback
- ✅ `run_history` is empty; no prior unresolved review items to carry forward.

## Jit issue dependencies
- ✅ `issue.dependencies` is empty; no prerequisite blockage.

VERDICT: FAIL
---
Gate result: FAILED
